sentence: וַתּוֹצֵא הָאָרֶץ דֶּשֶׁא עֵשֶׂב מַזְרִיעַ זֶרַע לְמִינֵהוּ וְעֵץ עֹשֶׂה־פְּרִי אֲשֶׁר זַרְעוֹ־בוֹ לְמִינֵהוּ וַיַּרְא אֱלֹהִים כִּי־טוֹב

grammatical-notes.וַתּוֹצֵא: Waw-consecutive + Verb, Hiphil Imperfect 3fs. 'And it caused to go out'. Execution of the command.
grammatical-notes.לְמִינֵהוּ: Preposition + Noun + Suffix. 'According to its kind'.
grammatical-notes.וַיַּרְא... כִּי־טוֹב: Formula for forensic inspection and verdict.

dictionary-meaning.וַתּוֹצֵא: Brought forth and produced — disclosing the Hiphil causative execution of the earth (Rule 11).
dictionary-meaning.לְמִינֵהוּ: According to their specific biological kinds — maintaining consistency with the classification established in Unit 11 (Rule 21).

main-translation: ***And the material foundation of the physical world brought forth and produced young sprouting plants and seed-producing herbs according to their specific biological kinds, along with fruit-producing trees containing their own seed within them according to their specific biological kinds; and Elohim personally inspected and appraised the result, witnessing that it was excellent in both function and nature.***

main-translation-explanation.brought forth and produced: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Disclosed the Hiphil 'bringing out' agency of the ground (Rule 11).

rejected-translations.phrase: And the earth brought forth grass
rejected-translations.reason: Thin agency; fails to disclose the specific biological classification.
